name: iXensor Co., Ltd.
summary: iXensor Co., Ltd. develops, produces, and sells hardware and software systems for in-vitro diagnostic medical devices. The company's PixoTest technology uses the lighting and image sensing module of the smartphone to detect the color change reaction on the biochemical test strip. It offers PixoTest Blood Glucose Monitoring System and PixoTest POCT System for chronic diseases management; Eveline Smart Fertility System for women's health management; and systems for infectious disease management, as well as PixoHealth App, which measures, records, and uploads test readings to the cloud. The company was founded in 2012 and is based in Taipei, Taiwan.
